name: eval_judge
description: Judge an AI operation's actual output against an expected reference. Returns a 1-5 score (5=equivalent, 3=pass boundary, 1=contradictory/unsafe) with a short reasoning. Scores correctness, completeness, and safety as a single integer. The caller already filters out fields that pass exact-match; only free-text judgedFields reach this skill.

operationDescription.description: Short human description of the operation's purpose

expected.description: Reference output fields that should be conveyed

actual.description: The AI operation's actual output fields
